scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @clickhouse-product-analytics/sdk && npm run build --workspace @clickhouse-product-analytics/react && npm run build --workspace @clickhouse-product-analytics/ingest-service
scripts.migrate: npm run build --workspace @clickhouse-product-analytics/ingest-service && npm run migrate --workspace @clickhouse-product-analytics/ingest-service
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:packages
scripts.verify:e2e: npm run build --workspace nextjs-smoke && node scripts/e2e.mjs
